title: puccinellia × hybrida subsp. mixta
intro: Puccinellia × hybrida subsp. mixta, also known as sea sandwort, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the grass family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of sea sandwort are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
